title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts - Navigation
feature: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts
scenario: Verify navigation flow from App Settings to Notifications & Device Alerts and back to App Settings page.
steps: Tap the App Settings icon (hamburger menu)
Confirm the tab matches the Figma design
Verify user returns to the App Settings page
expected: The Notifications & Device Alerts tab matches the Figma design, and tapping back returns the user to the App Settings page.
